name: Three Bean Bake
recipeIngredient: (Found in the Mexican section of the store)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole or dish, combine all ingredients. Mix well.
2. Cover with wax paper.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 8 - 11 minutes, stirring twice during cooking.
4. If a thicker juice is desired, continue microwaving in two-minute increments at 80% power, stirring often.
Crock Pot Directions:
1. Combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. Cover and cook on the High setting for 2 hours.
3. If a thicker juice is desired, remove the cover and cook for an additional hour, stirring occasionally.
